kalai-alexander.text: Alexander Zachary Kalai (Republican) is a candidate for U.S. Representative, TX-07.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Alexander Zachary Kalai had raised $315,098 and spent $315,098 for this campaign.
No public voting record in our set for Alexander Zachary Kalai (not currently a member of Congress).

fletcher-elizabeth.text: Elizabeth Fletcher (Democratic) is the current officeholder running for U.S. Representative, TX-07.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Elizabeth Fletcher had raised $1,229,657 and spent $795,425 for this campaign.

On 7-Jan-2025, Elizabeth Fletcher voted Nay on H R 29. A Yea vote required federal detention of unauthorized immigrants charged with theft, burglary, larceny, or assaulting a law enforcement officer, and let state attorneys general sue the federal government over certain immigration enforcement decisions.

base.summary: This is the U.S. House race for TX-07. In the most recent election (2024-11-05), Lizzie Fletcher (DEM) won by about 22.46 points out of 244471 votes cast. The bullets below summarize each current candidate's public finance and voting-record data where available.
base.caveats: This summary only includes facts found in our sourced dataset (FEC finance filings and U.S. House Clerk roll-call votes). It omits anything we could not verify from those sources. No public data in our set on any candidate's policy positions for this race (the positions field was empty for every candidate as of this build). No public data in our set on Alexander Zachary Kalai's policy positions. No public data in our set on Elizabeth Fletcher's policy positions.
